productDisplayName: Highlander Men Blue White Checked Slim Fit Shirt
description: CompositionFull sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has grey and white plaid checks with red  accents,  tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar, patch pocket on the left chest with thread detailing, hang loop on the upper back,  full length buttoned placket with grey buttons,  buttoned cuffs, brand tab on the facing placket at the bottom and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this  grey and white plaid shirt from highlander. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
